modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error message when using Slido in PowerPoint on macOS

full_description_text: I'm trying to use Slido in PowerPoint, but I keep getting an error message. It says I need to update the Slido app. I don't know how to do that, and I need help.
short_description: Error message when using Slido in PowerPoint on macOS
description: I'm trying to use Slido in PowerPoint, but I keep getting an error message. It says I need to update the Slido app. I don't know how to do that, and I need help.
